title: agropyron piliferum
intro: Agropyron piliferum, also known as big sandreed, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of big sandreed include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
